steps.title: Find the main verb
steps.content: The sentence already has a main verb: analyzed. The blank must modify researchers without adding another finite verb that competes with the main verb.

steps.title: Choose the participle
steps.content: A, B, and D are finite verb forms, so each would create an ungrammatical sentence with two main verbs and no connector. The non-finite participle properly modifies the researchers. The answer is C.
